operations.name: Three-Gate Alignment Audit
operations.description: For each ILO-Assessment-Activity triplet, verify alignment at three gates: ILO↔AT, AT↔TLA, and criteria↔ILO. Return traffic-light status per gate with remediation suggestions.

operations.name: Verb Unpacking & Refinement
operations.description: When an ILO uses non-observable verbs (understand, know, learn), prompt user for observable evidence then suggest Bloom's-aligned verb + knowledge dimension pair.

operations.name: Activity Selection Matrix
operations.description: Map objective type (Bloom's L1-L6 / affective / skill) to recommended activity formats with time estimates, scaled by learner prior knowledge and class size.

operations.name: Breadth-vs-Depth Decision Rule
operations.description: When time is constrained: lecture for L1-L2, active methods for L3-L5. Compress case quantity, choose bridging cases, offload L1-L2 to pre-class.

operations.name: Objective Decomposition (Core + Choice)
operations.description: Decompose course objectives into core set (all must master) and extension set (some may). Align differentiation boundaries to this split.

operations.name: Diagnostic Pre-Assessment & 3-Tier Grouping
operations.description: Use short pre-assessment to sort learners into 3 tiers (emerging/developing/proficient) as differentiation input.

operations.name: Pathway Differentiation with Convergence Checkpoints
operations.description: Design tiered learning paths (scaffolded/semi-structured/compacted) with regular convergence checkpoints for core objective verification.

operations.name: Three-Layer Feedback System
operations.description: Rubric-based calibration (coverage) + peer assessment (scaling) + rotating teacher deep feedback (depth). Design the feedback system, not the labor.

operations.name: Feedback Closure Cycle
operations.description: Reserve in-class time for students to read feedback and immediately revise. Ensures feedback reception → understanding → action chain.

operations.name: Activity Failure Mode Checker
operations.description: Before selecting an activity, run automated checklist of 3-5 common failure conditions specific to that activity type.

operations.name: Constraint Input Collector
operations.description: Before alignment audit, collect fixed constraints: exam policy, class size, TA support, accreditation. Prevents infeasible recommendations.

operations.name: Multi-Modal Switching (Low-Resource UDL)
operations.description: Cover same concept via listen-see-do three-channel switch. Zero-cost UDL Representation implementation.

operations.name: Choice Board
operations.description: Single A4 sheet listing 4 practice/expression modes; students complete N of N. Low-cost differentiation with student agency.

operations.name: Flipped Classroom Readiness Diagnostic
operations.description: Given learner and context data, recommend pre-class compliance strategy and diagnose non-compliance type (motivation/skill/time).
